rawAssistant: Traveler, if you're in such a hurry, you'd do well to not forget that one side road is shrouded in mystery now – all because of that last gale. Lanterns on the planks were blown clean away, and signs are fresh as dew. Don't leave before dawn without double-checking what happened there; it might just save your skin.
